text.title: JavaScript/TypeScript Stack Practices Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the practices-js-ts-stack methodology end-to-end.

step.name: init-package
step.action: Initialise package.json with type=module + packageManager pin (defer to pnpm-package-management).

step.name: emit-tsconfig
step.action: Write tsconfig.json with strict + noUncheckedIndexedAccess + module=NodeNext + moduleResolution=NodeNext + target=ES2022.

step.name: emit-eslint-flat
step.action: Write eslint.config.js using @eslint/js + typescript-eslint flat presets + eslint-config-prettier last. no-any + no-unused-vars as errors.

step.name: emit-prettier
step.action: Write .prettierrc with project conventions (semi, trailingComma=all, printWidth=100).

step.name: emit-ci
step.action: Write CI workflow with discrete steps: install, tsc --noEmit, lint, test, build. Each step failing fails the job.
